name: Microchip Technology
analysis: MCHP has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at $89.4977. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry $89.4977, stop $84.4272, target $91.7794. Risk/reward is 0.45:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
